LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JACQUELINE BELL'S MOTION RE: ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT (PER EX PARTE ORDER OF 9/23/02) MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED THE COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER. AFTER THE DISCUSSION, COUNSEL INFORMED THE COURT OF THE MODIFIED SETTLEMENT. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER OFF THE CALENDAR PENDING THE EXECUTION OF THE MODIFIED SETTLEMENT. THIS COURT RETAINS JURISDICATION PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6. BOTH PARTIES HAVE THE RIGHT TO RENOTICE THE MOTION. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-30-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

Off Calendar Feb-13-2003 Continued To Apr-01-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Defendant Jacqueline Bell'S Motion Re: Enforcement Of Settlement (Per Ex Parte Order Of 9/23/02)
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sydney Jay Hall, Esq., 650/342-1830, for defendant Jacqueline Bell mvoing to enforce the settlement
Darrell Cameron Horsted, Esq., 921-3100, for plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court ordered the counsel to meet and confer. After the discussion, counsel informed the court of the modified settlement. The Court took the matter off the calendar pending the execution of the modified settlement. This court retains jurisdication pursuant to CCP 664.6. Both parties have the right to renotice the motion. (JJM/301/CL) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
